properties.name: thanlinardos.springenterpriselibrary.batch.run-timer.frequency-ms
properties.description: The frequency in milliseconds at which the batch run timer triggers.

properties.name: thanlinardos.springenterpriselibrary.batch.run-timer.initial-delay-ms
properties.description: The initial delay in milliseconds before the batch run timer starts.

properties.name: thanlinardos.springenterpriselibrary.batch.run-timer.schedule-window-seconds
properties.description: The schedule window in seconds for the batch run timer.

properties.name: batch.vault-sync.backoff-step-size
properties.description: Seconds added per back-off step when a Vault sync task fails.

properties.name: batch.vault-sync.max-delay
properties.description: Maximum back-off delay in seconds for Vault sync retries.

properties.name: batch.vault-sync.max-task-retries
properties.description: Maximum number of task-level retry attempts for the Vault sync job.

properties.name: batch.vault-sync.max-execution-attempts
properties.description: Maximum number of scheduler execution attempts per cycle for the Vault sync job.

properties.name: batch.vault-sync.max-lease-expiry-percent
properties.description: Percentage of Vault lease duration after which a secret is proactively renewed (0–100).

properties.name: batch.vault-sync.run-on-startup
properties.description: Whether to trigger an initial Vault sync run immediately on application startup.

properties.name: thanlinardos.springenterpriselibrary.oauth2.client-certificate-path-format
properties.description: Defines the path format where to find client certificates for OAuth2 client authentication.
